user_query:
I need to launch a new herbal supplement on Amazon US and want a complete listing content pack plus a pricing and FBA prep plan. Please read input/product_brief.json (product specs, costs, dimensions) and input/competitors.csv (titles, prices, reviews of top competitors). Then create the following deliverables under output/: 1) output/listing.json — exact fields and constraints: { "marketplace": "US", "category": "Health & Household > Vitamins & Dietary Supplements > Herbal Supplements", "title": "...", "bullets": ["... 5 items ..."], "description_html": "...", "backend_search_terms": "...", "compliance_disclaimer_included": true } - Title: <= 200 characters, formatted as [Brand] + [Product] + [Key Feature] + [Size/Quantity] - Bullets: exactly 5 items, each <= 500 characters, each starting with an [ALL CAPS HEADER] - Description: basic HTML only (

,
,

    ,
  • , ) - Backend search terms: comma-separated, <= 250 bytes - Avoid medical claims; include the FDA disclaimer in either the description or the checklist below - Optimize based on competitor insights and the product brief 2) output/pricing_analysis.json — include and calculate: { "competitor_summary": {"lowest_price": number, "highest_price": number, "median_price": number}, "chosen_price": number, "referral_fee_rate": number, "referral_fee_amount": number, "fba_fee_estimate": number, "storage_fee_estimate": number, "cog_unit_cost": number, "net_profit": number, "margin_percent": number, "notes": "brief justification of price and assumptions" } - Use the competitor data to choose a rational price point - Assume a realistic referral fee rate for this category and show the math (referral fee amount = chosen_price * referral_fee_rate) - Show a net profit and margin percent calculation that includes referral fee, FBA fee estimate, storage estimate, and COGS 3) output/compliance_checklist.md — a checklist for supplements that includes the exact FDA disclaimer text and the required label elements (Supplement Facts, ingredients, directions, allergens, manufacturer info, expiration, etc.). 4) output/fba_prep_plan.md — a step-by-step FBA prep and labeling plan for this supplement (include labeling, FNSKU, packaging, suffocation warning if poly-bagged, and any expiration/lot/date requirements for inbound).
